title: Burst Fire Mode- A combat module for use with Foundry VTT Cyberpunk Red
description:
Burst Fire Mode- A combat module for use with Foundry VTT Cyberpunk Red

This module adds two items and a world script to the Foundry VTT Cyberpunk Red system. When Burst Fire 2 or Burst Fire 3 upgrades are installed in guns, they trigger on standard and aimed attacks to fire in either 2 or 3 round bursts. In the event of insufficient ammo for the burst and a shortened burst, a card will be posted to the chat room. Suppressive and Autofire are not impacted.

This should allow you to build out Cyberpunk Edgerunner Mission Kit weapons that fire in 2 and 3 round bursts. If you use the gunpath generator, this is also handy for giving a "down side" to gunpath guns that are one or two tiers cheaper than they would otherwise be due to that generator's way of determining gun prices.

Requirements:

  • Burst Fire Mode 1.3.2 is compatible with Foundry V12. V11 compatibility has been dropped. For v11 compatibility please use v1.2.0.
  • Cyberpunk Red Core System v0.92 or later.

Installation:

  • Install the module as normal. You will see a compendium with 2 items in it. These items are upgrades and any projectile you install them in will become a burst fire weapon.
  • No other configuration needed. Burst Fire only works in Aimed and Standard attacks. Suppressive and Autofire work RAW.

This should cause little to no issues but as always you may wish to back your world up before installing.

"Burst Fire Mode is unofficial content provided under the Homebrew Content Policy of R. Talsorian Games and is not approved or endorsed by RTG. This content references materials that are the property of R. Talsorian Games and its licensees."
